_README: This is the SINGLE place for all test logins. Copy this file to
credentials.json is git-ignored so your real passwords are never pushed.
On the deployed server (Render) you don't upload this file - instead set
the same values as environment variables (see DEPLOY.md). Env vars always
admin    -> company owner. Logs into /admin.html with one password.
owners   -> each restaurant owner. Logs into /owner.html with their
3-digit code + password. These seed the demo data on first run.
customers-> NOTE: customers do NOT log in. They order by entering a
restaurant code and being within its location radius. The
list below is only a convenience note for your own testing.

customers.label: Test customer 1
customers.name: Test Customer
customers.note: No password needed - just uses restaurant code 481 while near its location
